# carlos

The general-purpose TUI agent. Sees the vault via [[mvp-roadmap]] and
[[hermes-distillation]]. Skill induction documented in
[[skill-induction|skill induction notes]].

## Phase 11 — Research mode

Research mode landed in Phase 11. The orchestrator queries `web_search`
and `web_fetch` against multiple sources.

## Phase 12 — Notes

This file is where we land the new notes_* tool family.
